subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: You are near to God, and day by day you will progress by the knowledge of God toward spiritual joy. Then you will be a source of guidance to others.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @nearness to God, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @being a source of light; guidance
